# Beacon Indica

> Venture studios embedded inside Indian college campuses — a structured pipeline that takes students from idea to funded startup.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Beacon Indica ecosystem and pipeline.
- [Programs](/programs): Genesis, Fellowship, and Accelerator — three structured programs from campus to capital.
- [Venture Studio](/venture-studio): How Beacon Indica embeds venture studios inside college campuses.
- [About](/about): Vision, mission, and what makes Beacon different.
- [Advisory Board](/advisory-board): The operators and investors guiding the Beacon ecosystem.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos from campus events, founder sessions, and demo days.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for partnerships, programs, or careers.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms and conditions for using the platform.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle your data.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund terms for the Genesis program.
